brief.conclusion: 阿里云宣布推出全新AI编程助手，集成多种开发工具，提高开发者效率。
brief.why_hot: 标志着大厂在AI辅助编程领域的进一步布局，有望推动行业标准。

brief.conclusion: 谷歌发布新版本的代码生成模型Codey，支持更多编程语言。
brief.why_hot: 扩展了AI在软件开发中的应用范围，降低了多语言项目的门槛。

brief.conclusion: obra/superpowers项目迅速走红，提供了一种新的软件开发方法论。
brief.why_hot: 提出了一种创新性的开发理念，可能引领未来的技术趋势。

brief.conclusion: codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x成为GitHub上最受欢迎的学习资源之一。
brief.why_hot: 通过实践来学习的方式受到广泛欢迎，有助于培养实战能力。

brief.conclusion: langchain-ai/deepagents首次亮相即获得大量关注，展示了AI代理的新可能性。
brief.why_hot: 结合了先进的自然语言处理技术与智能规划工具，为自动化任务提供了强大支持。

brief.conclusion: KiiChain启动公共销售活动，为早期参与者提供USDC奖励。
brief.why_hot: 为Web3社区成员提供了参与新兴项目的机会，促进生态系统的增长。

brief.conclusion: ADREVA开启早期访问任务，邀请用户提前体验其平台。
brief.why_hot: 让感兴趣的用户能够尽早接触并反馈产品，有助于快速迭代优化。

github_trending.name: obra/superpowers
github_trending.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

github_trending.name: codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x
github_trending.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

github_trending.name: abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
github_trending.description: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine -       GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

github_trending.name: langchain-ai/deepagents
github_trending.description: Agent harness built with LangChain and LangGraph. Equipped with a planning tool, a filesystem backend, and the ability to spawn subagents - well-equipped to handle complex agentic tasks.

github_trending.name: jarrodwatts/claude-hud
github_trending.description: A Claude Code plugin that shows what's happening - context usage, active tools, running agents, and todo progress

github_trending.name: cloudflare/workerd
github_trending.description: The JavaScript / Wasm runtime that powers Cloudflare Workers

github_trending.name: dimensionalOS/dimos
github_trending.description: Dimensional is the agentic operating system for physical space. Vibecode humanoids, quadrupeds, drones, and other hardware platforms in natural language and build multi-agent systems that work seamlessly with physical input (cameras, lidar, actuators).

github_trending.name: TauricResearch/TradingAgents
github_trending.description: TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework

github_trending.name: MiroMindAI/MiroThinker
github_trending.description: MiroThinker is a deep research agent optimized for complex research and prediction tasks. Our latest models, MiroThinker-1.7 and MiroThinker-H1, achieve 74.0 and 88.2 on the BrowseComp, respectively.

github_trending.name: financial-datasets/mcp-server
github_trending.description: An MCP server for interacting with the Financial Datasets stock market API.

github_trending.name: volcengine/OpenViking
github_trending.description: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.

github_trending.name: Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad
github_trending.description: Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.

github_trending.name: shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code
github_trending.description: Bash is all you need -  A nano claude code–like agent harness, built from 0 to 1

github_trending.name: fluxerapp/fluxer
github_trending.description: A free and open source instant messaging and VoIP platform built for friends, groups, and communities. Self-hosting and more activity in this repository is coming very soon! See the README.
